description_long: This is a standard orange basketball with a pebbled, textured surface for grip and control. The ball features classic black channel lines that divide the surface into eight distinct panels, arranged symmetrically around the sphere. The surface appears to be made of synthetic leather or rubber, typical for outdoor and indoor basketballs, with a slightly matte finish. There are no visible brand logos, markings, or signs of wear, giving it a clean and new appearance. The seams are slightly recessed, providing tactile feedback for handling and dribbling. The inflation valve is not visible in any of the provided views.
description: A clean, orange basketball with black channel lines and a textured, grippy surface. The ball is free of logos, wear, or visible markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the basketball's orange surface and a prominent central black channel line.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of the black channel lines and the textured surface.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the central black channel line and visible panel divisions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the black channel lines and the ball's uniform texture.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with black recessed channels forming symmetrical curved sections.
